column1: # ESP32-S3 partition table - Heltec HTIT-Tracker V2 (8MB flash
# Drops the OTA slot (app1) and shrinks app0 from 3MB to 2MB so LittleFS
# can grow from 1.5MB to ~5.9MB. The V2 build is the no-SD variant
# every byte of session storage matters. Current firmware uses ~1.25MB
# Capacity at ~70 B per CSV row
